title: crossandra infundibuliformis subsp. arida
intro: Crossandra infundibuliformis subsp. arida is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as a type of wild crossandra. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Crossandra infundibuliformis subsp. arida typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical paste for skin conditions.
